prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ALUMCASE-CONTAINERS-PARENT-TT Product Type: ART_SUPPLIES Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Tin, 1/2 Oz Container Set & Display Case for Jewelry, Cosmetics, Spices, Crafting Description: Keep small parts, crafts, spices, jewelry, or minerals organized with the ToolTreaux Aluminum Storage Jar Container Set.

The ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Container Sets are a great addition to any craft set, hobby station, or kitchen. Featuring either 12, 15 or 20 aluminum containers with clear glass lids, you'll be able to organize all of your small items - jewelry, cosmetics, spices, crafting supplies, tool pieces, hardware, and more.

Each jar uses a twist off lid so you can safely secure everything inside. Because the top is constructed with a clear glass window, you'll easily be able to tell your items apart without having to label the containers. All of the jars fit conveniently within the included aluminum case, allowing for easy transportation and organization.

These sets make great gifts for crafters and hobbyists alike. Search Terms: aluminum jar storage tin container round metal spice oz half one clear top lid organizer organization hobbies display case candles 12 arts crafts cosmetics diy portable travel food grade glass kitchen small jewelry stamps gems Features: - DURABLE ALUMINUM BODY - Each jar is made of lightweight and durable aluminum to ensure they are reusable and last for years - CLEAR TOP - The press-top lids have a clear glass window so you can easily find and organize the items you need - PERFECT FOR HOBBIES - These jars make a great accessory to any hobby, allowing you to store, organize, and display small parts and pieces such as gems, stamps, coins, and more - DISPLAY AND CARRY CASE - Each set comes with an aluminum, foam-lined case to store the jars, making it easy to display, transport, and organize with minimal space - SPECIFICATIONS: 20, 15, or 12 Piece Set; Dimensions: 1.25 x 1.25 x 0.75 inches; Capacity: 0.5 fl Oz; Color: Silver; Material: Aluminum, Glass === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Aluminum Jar Storage Tin 0.5 Oz Silver
